calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brandon Tang of Law Offices of Patenaude & Felix telephone number 510-896-9411 for Plaintiff Capital One Bank.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The Bank and its Counsel are commended for their candor and good conduct. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
